strategy_adjustments.earnings-momentum: Normal operation but reduce size around macro events; favour long setups on high-conviction names only.
strategy_adjustments.post-shock: Normal operation; focus on liquid names with clear fundamental thesis for mean-reversion.
strategy_adjustments.macro-volatility: Increased opportunity window; favour volatility event plays around NFP, CPI, ISM; tight stops on directional index trades.
strategy_adjustments.crypto: Small size only; sub-3x leverage; BTC above key support, altcoin momentum fragile.
strategy_adjustments.pair-trades: Sector rotation active — tech/energy and pharma relative-value pairs most interesting.

notes: S&P 500 near record highs but February finished as only the second losing month in the last ten; VIX just under 20 with elevated geopolitical and macro risk. AI infrastructure remains a key driver of single-name volatility. Jobs data and Iran headlines are primary risk factors this week.
